subject: [SECURITY] Use fixed version of security versions script
commit_message:
[SECURITY] Use fixed version of security versions script

Use the version of versions security script which is hosted
on integration repository.

Issue-ID: TEST-394
Signed-off-by: Michal Jagiello <michal.jagiello@t-mobile.pl>
Change-Id: Ib49ab1f6615c878f01ce8ff38918387a39ad2085

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/203/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/203/ )

The line in commit is too long: it has a size of 86 instead of 80 characters maximum.

Line in cause: Use the version of versions security script which is hosted on integration repository. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/integration-xtesting-master-commit-lint/203/ )
